title: Sitemap Crawler Input
description: Extract all URLs from XML sitemaps, including nested sitemap indexes. Optionally check each URL for HTTP status codes.

sitemapUrls.title: Sitemap URLs
sitemapUrls.description: One or more sitemap XML URLs to crawl. Supports sitemap index files (auto-discovers child sitemaps). If not provided, the Actor will auto-discover sitemaps via /sitemap.xml and robots.txt.

websiteUrl.title: Website URL (for auto-discovery)
websiteUrl.description: If no sitemap URLs are provided, enter the website root URL here. The Actor will auto-discover sitemaps via /sitemap.xml and robots.txt.

checkHttpStatus.title: Check HTTP Status of Each URL
checkHttpStatus.description: When enabled, sends a HEAD request to each URL to check if it returns 200, 301, 404, etc. Significantly increases runtime for large sitemaps.

filterPattern.title: URL Filter Pattern (regex)
filterPattern.description: Optional regex pattern to filter URLs. Only URLs matching this pattern will be included. Example: '/blog/' to only return blog URLs.

maxUrls.title: Max URLs to Extract
maxUrls.description: Maximum total URLs to extract across all sitemaps (0 = unlimited). Use to limit very large sitemaps.

outputFormat.title: Output Format
outputFormat.description: 'full' returns all sitemap fields (url, lastmod, changefreq, priority). 'urls-only' returns a simple list of URLs for easy copy-paste.
